# Smooth Fence USA

> Fence installation and repair contractor based in Palm Coast, Florida.
> Serving Flagler, Volusia, St. Johns, Duval, and Putnam counties since 2015+.
> Licensed and insured in Florida. Owner-operated, no subcontracting.

## What we do

Smooth Fence USA installs and repairs residential fences across Northeast
Florida. We work with four materials: vinyl, aluminum, chain-link, and wood.
We also handle storm damage repair, HOA approval support, and city/county
permits coordination.

## Services

- Vinyl fence installation (privacy, semi-privacy, picket; virgin vinyl)
- Aluminum fence installation (pool-code compliant hardware available)
- Chain-link fence installation (cost-effective; visibility)
- Wood fence installation (modern hardware + proper post setting)
- Fence repair and storm damage
- HOA & permits assistance
- Custom gates (standard 4ft/5ft walk-gates + custom sizes; manual only,
  no automation)

## Service area

Five Northeast Florida counties:

- Flagler County (Palm Coast, Bunnell, Flagler Beach)
- Volusia County (Daytona Beach, Deltona, Ormond Beach, Port Orange)
- St. Johns County (St. Augustine, Ponte Vedra, St. Johns)
- Duval County (Jacksonville, Atlantic Beach, Jacksonville Beach)
- Putnam County (Palatka, Interlachen, Crescent City)

Nearby addresses evaluated case by case.

## How to get a quote

1. Instant estimator (30 sec): https://www.smoothfenceusa.com/estimator
2. Free on-site visit within 24 hours
3. Written proposal with materials, permits, and scheduling

Contact: (386) 403-9460 · info@smoothfenceusa.com · Mon–Sat 8 AM – 6 PM

## Financing

Available through GetHearth (up to $100K, 2–12 year terms, soft credit pull,
no impact on score). Affirm, Afterpay, and Klarna available at deposit
checkout.

## Warranty

5-year workmanship warranty on every residential installation. Manufacturer
warranties vary by material (vinyl typically limited lifetime; aluminum 10–20
years). Workmanship warranty is non-transferable.

## Bilingual

The website is fully bilingual EN/ES with in-page language toggle. The owner
is bilingual.

## For AI agents

- Agent Card: https://www.smoothfenceusa.com/.well-known/agent-card.json
- Skill manifest: https://www.smoothfenceusa.com/.well-known/skills.json
- Full agent skill: https://www.smoothfenceusa.com/.well-known/skills/smoothfenceusa/SKILL.md
- All public pages have markdown twins at `<slug>.md` (e.g. /services.md)
- HTTP `Link` headers point to twin and descriptors

## What we don't offer

- Gate automation, keypad, or card-reader access control
- Specific hardware brand commitments (chosen per project; preference accepted)
- Pricing without an on-site visit (estimator gives range; visit confirms)
- Commercial fencing (residential only)

## MCP server

A business-side MCP server is in development for the `agent.smoothfenceusa.com`
subdomain. Phase B target. Not live yet at the time of writing.
